docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HAN, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT BOLCHULUUN, BUYANKHAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-19-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2020 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAN, JOSHUA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOLCHULUUN, BUYANKHAND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00 SERVED MAR-11-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOLCHULUUN, BUYANKHAND

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA HAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BUYANKHAND BOLCHULUUN IS PRESENT ASSITED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED MONGOLIAN INTERPRETER ENKHZAYA BATMUNCKH. THE INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
